TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Corey_Allen, title = Corey_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Corey_Allen} }

S.FORM: Corey Allen kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Corey Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) Corey Allen htagan beh sa Cleveland, Ohio. hiya ga yaya yaba Carl ru Fran Cohen. raral ga, Allen mqwas beh cyalifuniya , luosanci krahu' pqwasan biru. aring mqwas ru myugi mtzyaw nya. 1954 kwas hiya magal blaq balay biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Corey Allen kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Corey Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) Corey Allen htagan beh sa Cleveland, Ohio. hiya ga yaya yaba Carl ru Fran Cohen. raral ga, Allen mqwas beh cyalifuniya , luosanci krahu' pqwasan biru. aring mqwas ru myugi mtzyaw nya. 1954 kwas hiya magal blaq balay biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorej allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨorej allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨorej allen ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨle*elan*, oħio. ħija ɣa jaja jaβa ʦ~ʨarl ru *ran ʦ~ʨoħen. raral ɣa, allen mqwas~ɕ βeħ ʦ~ʨjali*unija , luos~ɕanʦ~ʨi kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. ariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi mtzjaw nja. **** kwas~ɕ ħija maɣal βlaq βalaj βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
